mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article_like (article_id, user_id, create_time, update_time, deleted, deleted_time) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{userId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted}, #{deletedTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM article_like WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT article_id FROM article_like WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_like WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_like WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
